channel.title: World
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from World, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘A history of the Earth’: Twelve Apostles revealed to be as old as 14m years
item.description: Tectonic plate movements over millions of years have lifted and tilted the layers, with records of ancient earthquakes in the rocks Get our breaking n...

item.title: Starmer brushes off reports that cabinet ministers don’t support him over sacking of Olly Robbins – UK politics live
item.description: The prime minister said that cabinet is still united and focused on delivering the government’s policy agenda Little says in March she had a meeting w...

item.title: JetBlue sued over claims it uses customers’ personal data to set ticket prices
item.description: Lawsuit follows exchange on X in which airline suggested customer should clear their cache or book with incognito window Sign up for the Breaking News...

item.title: EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine and fresh Russia sanctions – Europe live
item.description: Move comes after Hungary and Slovakia dropped opposition following reopening of the Druzhba oil pipeline Meanwhile, Ukraine’s president Volodymyr Zele...

item.title: Tennessee police investigate after finding bones believed to be from three children
item.description: Police chief says human remains had been in a wooded area for years and did not match local missing persons reports Sign up for the Breaking News US e...

item.title: Knife killings down by 21% in England and Wales, figures show
item.description: The annual ONS crime data also shows overall recorded homicides have fallen.

item.title: Three men guilty of 'callous' Brighton beach rape
item.description: The men, who are all asylum seekers, had denied targeting the woman in the early hours of October 4.

item.title: No Fifa plan for Italy to replace Iran at World Cup
item.description: Fifa stands by comments made last week by president Gianni Infantino in which he said that "the Iranian team is coming, for sure".

item.title: Prince Louis holiday video released to mark eighth birthday
item.description: The footage was filmed by photographer Matt Porteous in Cornwall earlier this month.

item.title: No Fifa plan for Italy to replace Iran at World Cup
item.description: Fifa stands by comments made last week by president Gianni Infantino in which he said that "the Iranian team is coming, for sure".
